dialogos.texto_en: Hey, Miku and Raiha.\nWere you resting here?
Ah, big bro.\nDid you come here to take a break too?
Not really for a break, I just came to see you guys.
Well, shall we take a break together, Futaro?
Sure, why not?
Raiha-chan, did you get tired\nfrom swimming with Yotsuba?\nAre you okay?
I'm fine, but Itsuki-san swam with us too and got\ntotally annihilated.
Oh, she was quite exhausted.\nBut Nino took care of her,\nso I think she's okay.
I was surprised that Yotsuba-san swam\nwithout getting out of breath!
I heard she's good at sports,\nbut now she is as fast as an athlete.
Yotsuba joined various sports clubs and set records.\nIn a way, she's already an athlete.
Yeah, that's right.
She said that she wanted a break herself,\nso maybe she's resting somewhere.
I was surprised that Yotsuba-san swam\nwithout getting out of breath!
I heard she's good at sports,\nbut she's like an athlete now.
Yotsuba has participated in various sports clubs\nand set records.\nIn a way, she's already like an athlete.
As a result, she even got recommended\nto a sports academy. That's amazing.
Wowww.\nYotsuba-san might become a professional athlete\nin the future.
Yotsuba, as a pro athlete...\nI'd never imagined that.
The scary thing about Yotsuba is that even becoming an \nathlete is not impossible.
She could even be a competitive swimmer!\nTo be able to swim THAT well is mind boggling.
Indeed. However, it's surprising\nthat we are allowed to swim in the ocean \nat this time of the year.
In Honshu, it's still too cold to swim.\nIt's amazing how the temperature can differ so much even in \nthe same country.
If the temperature is this high at this time of year, \nit would be too hot and dry in mid-summer.
Come to think of it. I read that somewhere in Okinawa,\nin the height of summer, you can actually get burned\nby the sun.
What? Then you can't even walk outside, right?
Yeah, that's why sunscreen and parasols are essential.
The environment is really different.\nIt was a good decision to come to Okinawa\nduring this time of the year.
Okinawa IS a subtropical region, \nbut some parts have a tropical climate.
By the way, Honshu has a mostly warm humid climate.
I learned that in class.
Wow, what we learn in class\ncan be useful in our daily lives!\nAmazing, eh?!
Come on...\nYou always manage to connect everything and anything\nback to studying, don't you, big bro?
Anyway, let's make sure to apply sunscreen properly.\nRaiha-chan, you also swam in the ocean,\nso it's better to reapply it.
Okay.
Futaro, make sure you do it properly too.
Yeah, it's a hassle,\nbut it's necessary to protect ourselves.
It's nice that there are fewer people around.\nWe can enjoy the beach at our own leisure.
Indeed. I thought there would be more people\nsince this is a tourist spot.
There aren't so many people that we're unable to swim,\nand we can relax on our floats...
Thinking about it, coming here at this time of the year\nwas definitely the right choice.
So, my proposal was perfect, wasn't it?!
Teehee, it was.
Anyway, let's make sure to apply sunscreen properly.\nRaiha-chan, you also swam in the ocean,\nso it's better to reapply it.
Okay.
Futaro, make sure you do it properly too.
Yeah, it's a hassle,\nbut it's necessary to protect ourselves.
It'd be great in midsummer too.\nI wonder if the stories are exaggerated,\nor if it's really that hot.
Huh?\nDo you wanna get sunburned, big bro?
It's not like I want to get sunburned.\nI just want to know if it gets as hot as they say,\nand experience it for myself.
Experiencing it for yourself\nis different from just hearing about it, ya know.
Futaro, you've changed.
Huh? How so?
You used to be so full of yourself,\nbut your way of thinking has changed.
We all have changed.
Well... A lot of things happened.
But, I still think that you are too headstrong, big bro.
Yes, you still need to work on that, perhaps.
Anyway, let's make sure to apply sunscreen properly.\nRaiha-chan, you also swam in the ocean,\nso it's better to reapply it.
Okay.
Futaro, make sure you do it properly too.
Yeah, it's a hassle,\nbut it's necessary to protect ourselves.
During winter, you don't need sunscreen, right?
Well, I'm not sure, but I think it'll be okay.
...For me Okinawa is all about the ocean,\nbut it might be nice to come back in winter\nand explore other tourist spots besides the ocean.
Yeah, maybe getting some winter-exclusive gourmet food?\nItsuki would definitely be interested in that.
I thought that visiting at a different time of the year might \nbe a another way to enjoy sightseeing in Okinawa.
If there's another chance to come to Okinawa,\nit would be nice to enjoy it in winter.
Next time, eh...
If we make a plan, will you come too, Futaro?
If I don't bother you quintuplets too much.
It's not a bother at all.\nAnd also, we'll make sure you can spend time with Nino\nas well. You can rest assured about that.
Rest assured, huh...
Raiha-chan, you're also invited, just\ncome along with Futaro.
Teehee, thank you very much!
